fully stopped in a Li+Ta target. After subtraction of

differential neutron emission cross sections for
15.17 and 17.17 MeV triton on Li were derived.
The spectrum is contaminated by a hydrogen peak which
lead to the conclusion that the Lithium target was
(partly) a LiOH target. Thus a composition of the
target of 9.37 mg/cm2 LiOH and 3.15 mg/cm2 pure Li
